ascii_heavy_candidates.source: The Texture Manager has one simple role: convert images to RenderMan's texture format, using OpenImageIO or
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: Texture Manager 的职责很简单：将 images 转换为 RenderMan 的 texture format，使用 OpenImageIO 或

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: . It handles single images as well as texture atlases (UDIM, Mudbox, ZBrush).
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: 。它既处理单张 images，也处理 texture atlases（UDIM、Mudbox、ZBrush）。

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: User interface
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: User interface（用户界面）

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: When you open a new scene, the Texture Manager will find all images used as textures and add them to a queue to convert them. The conversion settings will be based on a set of rules defined in a
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: 打开新 scene 时，Texture Manager 会找到所有用作 textures 的 images，并将它们加入 queue 进行转换。Conversion settings 会基于一组定义在

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: (see below). Use the Settings pane to modify the settings for the currently selected image(s), then the Apply button to re-convert the image(s) with the new settings.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: 中的 rules（见下文）。使用 Settings pane 修改当前所选 image(s) 的 settings，然后使用 Apply button 以新 settings 重新转换 image(s)。

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: Pick Directories
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: Pick Directories

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: Stop / Start the conversion queue
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: Stop / Start the conversion queue（停止/启动转换队列）

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: By default, the conversion queue is always running, but sometimes you may want to stop the conversion process.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: 默认情况下，conversion queue 始终运行，但有时你可能想停止 conversion process。

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: The conversion queue can be stopped and restarted by clicking on the icon on the right of the progress bar. When the queue is stopped, the running worker processes are immediately killed but existing textures are intact. When you restart, it pick up where it left.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: 点击 progress bar 右侧的 icon 可以停止并重新启动 conversion queue。当 queue 停止时，正在运行的 worker processes 会立即被终止，但现有 textures 保持完好。重新启动后，它会从离开的地方继续。

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: Conversion information
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: Conversion information（转换信息）

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: There is a disk usage and progress indicator at the bottom of the Texture Manager window.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: Texture Manager window 底部有 disk usage 和 progress indicator。

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: Each file in the list also has a status icon.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: 列表中的每个 file 也都有 status icon。

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: Interactive versus Batch rendering
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: Interactive versus Batch rendering（交互式与批量渲染）

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: During interactive renders, the texture manager will add new textures to the queue and return a temporary texture until the conversion is done. Once done, it will send an update to the renderer and your texture will appear.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: 在 interactive renders 期间，texture manager 会将新 textures 添加到 queue，并返回 temporary texture，直到 conversion 完成。完成后，它会向 renderer 发送更新，你的 texture 会显示出来。

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: render, you need all your textures to be converted first. Starting with 22.3, RfM will stop the conversion queue and add any remaining conversion task to the LocalQueue or Tractor job to ensure you always get the expected image.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: render 时，需要先转换所有 textures。从 22.3 开始，RfM 会停止 conversion queue，并将任何剩余 conversion task 添加到 LocalQueue 或 Tractor job，以确保始终得到预期图像。

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: : OpenImageIO will use the OpenImageIO library for texture conversion, launching rmanoiiotool processes. Legacy will use RenderMan’s txmake processes. This change will take effect after Maya is restarted.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: ：OpenImageIO 会使用 OpenImageIO library 进行 texture conversion，并启动 rmanoiiotool processes。Legacy 会使用 RenderMan 的 txmake processes。此更改会在 Maya 重启后生效。

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: Number of processes
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: Number of processes

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: : How many worker processes will be launched at the same time. The default is 2 but it is often beneficial to add more processes to speed up the queue.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: ：同时启动多少个 worker processes。默认值为 2，但增加更多 processes 通常有助于加快 queue。

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: Fallback Texture Path
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: Fallback Texture Path

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: : By default, the texture manager saves the texture next to the source image. If, for any reason, it is impossible to save in that directory, the fallback texture path will be used.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: ：默认情况下，texture manager 会把 texture 保存在 source image 旁边。如果由于任何原因无法保存在该目录中，则会使用 fallback texture path。

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: Always Fallback
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: Always Fallback

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: : Always save converted textures in the fallback texture directory.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: ：始终将转换后的 textures 保存在 fallback texture directory 中。

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: Show Advanced Options
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: Show Advanced Options

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: : Show more advanced options in the user interface.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: ：在 user interface 中显示更多 advanced options。

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: Texture extensions
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: Texture extensions

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: : All texture file extensions so the texture manage knows which files can be marked as already converted.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: ：所有 texture file extensions，用于让 texture manager 知道哪些 files 可标记为已转换。

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: Texture Manager Configuration
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: Texture Manager Configuration（Texture Manager 配置）

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: The texture manager uses a set of rules to choose optimal OpenImageIO/txmake parameters based on:
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: texture manager 使用一组 rules，根据以下内容选择最佳 OpenImageIO/txmake parameters：

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: A set of base parameters for that type of node
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: 该 node 类型的一组 base parameters

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: one or more rules to modify the base parameters when considering the file's name, the bit depth, etc.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: 在考虑 file name、bit depth 等因素时，用于修改 base parameters 的一条或多条 rules

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: Custom settings can be defined by the
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: Custom settings（自定义设置）可以由

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: ocio configuration
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: ocio configuration

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: The default rules are built for efficiency and you shouldn't have to modify them unless you have specific pipeline requirements
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: 默认 rules 是为效率而构建的；除非有特定 pipeline requirements，否则不需要修改它们
